T4_VS_TCM_DDT2000_SW_v_1.7

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7CA
Recv ID: 7DA
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 77
Func Name: DCM

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "1",
    "supplier": "001",
    "soft": "0001",
    "version": "0001"
  }
]
